overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along railroad tracks through a rural landscape during a heavy rainstorm. The character eventually steps off the tracks and continues on a parallel dirt path toward a distant tunnel entrance while lightning flashes in the dark clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railway tracks through forested hills

events.description: lightning bolt strikes in the distance illuminating the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the center of the railroad tracks through the rain

entered.detail: wooden railroad ties with steel rails stretching into the distance
wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires running alongside the tracks
stone tunnel entrance or bridge structure visible in the distant hills
tree-covered rolling hills framing the railway corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along railroad tracks through a rural landscape during a heavy rainstorm. Dark storm clouds cover the sky, and a bolt of lightning flashes in the distance around the 9-second mark. Telegraph poles line the right side of the tracks as the character approaches a distant tunnel entrance visible between the forested hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside railway tracks approaching tunnel

events.description: character steps off the railroad tracks onto the dirt path to the left

agents.ego_description: stepped off the railroad tracks and continues walking on the dirt path running parallel to the tracks

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail running parallel to the railroad tracks

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the railroad tracks onto a dirt path running parallel to the tracks on the left side. The camera follows from behind as the character continues toward the tunnel entrance, which grows larger in the frame. The tracks remain visible to the right while the surrounding landscape consists of grassy hills and rocky cuttings under the ongoing storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched rural landscape as a character transitions from railroad tracks to a parallel dirt path. It begins with the character walking steadily along the tracks under dark storm clouds, with telegraph poles lining the route and a bolt of lightning flashing in the distance. As the character approaches a tunnel entrance nestled between forested hills, the camera maintains its position from behind while the character steps off the rails onto a dirt path to the left. The scene then shifts focus toward the tunnel as it grows larger in the frame, leaving the tracks to the right. Finally, the movement continues through a terrain of grassy hills and rocky cuttings under the persistent heavy rain.
